programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: As Cagney contends with her estranged father she and Lacey are recruited by Internal Affairs to spy on their fellow police officers

programme.title: Starsky and Hutchy
programme.desc: A series of suspicious deaths at a professional wrestling arena bring Starsky and Hutch into the squared circle a world of outsized stars misfits and greed-consumed con men

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: While visiting Hawkes old Vietnam buddy Greg Stewart Dominic Hawke become unwitting pawns in a potentially deadly custody battle between Gregs mother Martha June Allyson and ex-wife Rainey Rainey refuses to sign over custody of their infant son to Greg and Mrs Stewart holds Rainey hostage at their estate until the papers are signed Even worse the sinister Sheriff Waldren is on Mrs Stewarts payroll When a plane crash kills Greg Mrs Stewart realizes she will not be able to gain custody of her grandson and threatens Rainey The young mother hides her infant son with Dominic Hawke and Mrs Stewart orders Waldren to employ any means to get him back As Hawke tries to get Rainey out of the estate where she is being held captive Caitlin flies the Airwolf to Dominics hideout stops the crooked sheriff and his men from gaining custody Mrs Stewart and her co-conspirators are arrested by US Marshals after Waldren is killed taking on the Airwolf in a World War II fighter

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonias recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer but theres a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movies star have a checkered history Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor whos got too many cars and too many girlfriends Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Sing Cowboy Sing
programme.desc: Joe and Benny are two cowboys are on tour in the Wild West as a singing duo usually without a penny in their pockets to spare Joe is a talented rodeo-rider which fascinates the little girl Susanne and gives her the wish to have him as a father Her mother Maria however is to marry the evil rich farmer Dave Susanne wants to stop the wedding so she sneaks aboard Joe and Bennys wagon to persuade them to intervene Dave brands them as kidnappers forcing them to flee as outlaws to one of the families tyrannized by Dave Together they strike back at Dave at which point Maria sees that hes the wrong man for her

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E37
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E37

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E07
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E07

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas brings a dying man to North Fork he notices that Micah has a strange reaction when he first sees the man He sets out to discover why Micah seems so troubled

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark comes across the dead body of a stranger Although the man has no identification on him he does have a belt with the initials RM on it that may provide a clue to his identity

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E17 Friend
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E17 Friend

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: At the bedside of a seriously ill Adam Ben thinks back to his days as a first mate on a sailing ship and his marriage to Adams mother Elizabeth Stoddard

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are tasked to free a fellow agent incarcerated on Devils Island

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a delivery driver Kimble rescues a man and a woman from the wreckage of a small airplane All three have a problem the man is a politician the woman is not his wife and Kimble doesnt want publicity as the rescuer

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Lisa is a troubled 10-year-old who is put in Nicks custody after she witnesses a mob hit

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A recent widow comes to the realization that her late husband purchased a winning lottery ticket so she goes to great lengths to recover it -- and keep the winnings for herself Meanwhile a grave digger resorts to blackmail to land the woman of his dreams

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Fastidious actor Sterling Ames injures his back on the McCoys property and must remain on their sofa for several days much to the annoyance of cantankerous Grandpa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear help lady trucker Snow White and her friends fend off attacks by the Hi-Ballers a gang of truckers who dont cotton to competition from women in Winslow County turf they control with corrupt cops Wiley and the Fox

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13 Gen Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col Hogan falls for the bait As a result Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An assertive Gen Burkhalter requisitions the famous Édouard Manet painting The Fife Player from the Louvre museum in Paris to give to Hermann Goering as a birthday present Undaunted by seemingly impossible logistics Hogan and LeBeau decide to steal it back

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton from building his new Officers Club on McHales island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Santa McHale must practice some psychological warfare when he the crew Binghamton and a war correspondent are captured by a Japanese patrol while on a mission to bring some Christmas joy to the children of a nearby orphanage

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wont rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Max has met a lovely woman who seems to enjoy his company also -- but shes part of a theft ring that cleaned out the Harts

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: There is only one week left until nominations close for a VITA the Vermont Industry TV award and Dick is advised to animate his performance but he is against the idea of competition Michael is leading the charge towards an upbeat show

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is the substitute host of a childrens TV show Meanwhile Stephanie believes she has put on weight

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: In order to promote a better image and keep Camp Hollister from closure General Craig has invited over a photographer from the Men of the Military calendar makers to scout potential base talent

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Ryans old school friend Ashley arrives and takes her and Mitch to a research lab where she and her husband work on developing an inanimate laser After Mitch Ryan and Ashley accidentally step into the laser they slide in time to a parallel universe where they must fight for their lives against the creatures inhabiting the world

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: Hercules 215
programme.desc: Hercules 215

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne takes Debi to live on her familys farm but is unaware that the Morthren are already there trying to sort out their food shortages

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter Delmer Plebus Powells Gwent a huge spacecraft which defies aerodynamics and is an extension of Gwents genius and ego

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two Gunsmoke writers teamed on this modern-day Western set at a rodeo in San Franciscos Cow Palace A bronc rider dies in what appears to be an accident A rodeo clown looks around the scene after the police leave and discovers the riders rope -- which was cut almost halfway through before it broke leaving the bronc free to throw him The police come back to investigate the scene and before long the chief suspect is also murdered in another accident

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon does her job all too well when the latest mission requires her to feign love for a vain assassin Meanwhile Briggs and Barney work to get an over-the-hill terrorist out of the way

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A young man accidentally kills the driver of a Jeep that Kimble is riding in Kimble gets away but is later captured by Lt Gerard in a remote cabin But the real danger is from the boys father who is determined to protect his son no matter what

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne works for Charley Dolan who is given 24 hours to vacate his property A gang run by Len Garth is forcing people off their land He burns the newspaper office killing the owner Dolan offers money to rebuild the paper

programme.title: Young 219
programme.desc: Young 219

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Moment by Moment Harvest Ep 023

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.title: Digital Man
programme.desc: An out-of-control robot is inadvertently set loose in a small community and a crack squad of soldiers are sent to hunt it down Gradually the members of the squad begin to suspect that some of them are robots

programme.title: Cyber Tracker
programme.desc: This is the future A secret service agent is framed by his own and becomes the target of the seemingly indestructible Cyborg-Executioners

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall
In a totalitarian future society Winston Smith whose daily work is re-writing history tries to rebel by falling in love

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.desc: A recent widow comes to the realization that her late husband purchased a winning lottery ticket so she goes to great lengths to recover it -- and keep the winnings for herself Meanwhile a grave digger resorts to blackmail to land the woman of his dreams

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Changing your lifestyle from one of jail and rebellion to one of discipline and MMA is not an easy task, but Todd Stoute is prrof that it is possible to make that switch. At HK38, he is up against Clay Davidson and is looking for the win.

programme.desc: How does one begin to return to their sport after an injury? After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Steven Thomas and Jarren Hunt

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The ZOCHI Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Brand new army planes are disappearing just before they are about to land at McKenna Airfield The owner Dutch McKenna asks his friend Matt Trakker for help

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses a reversing machine to rob casinos in Las Vegas Matt calls in the MASK team to stop the heists and return the money

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill re-programs Scooter making him into a suicide bomber aimed at UNECOMs headquarters

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades gain an ally in Trident a cybernetichuman mix who takes the worlds leaders hostage

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world
